---
title: "Publication"
---

## Why This Section Exists

This section is not here to turn the site into a prestige machine.

It exists because many learners eventually need to understand how strong papers are assembled:

- how claims are framed
- how theorems and experiments support each other
- how positioning and evidence shape reviewer trust

## Publication Guides

- [Venue Map](venue-map.qmd)
- [How Top-Venue Papers Are Shaped](how-top-venue-papers-are-shaped.qmd)
- [Claim-Evidence Matrix](claim-evidence-matrix.qmd)
- [Related Work and Positioning](related-work-and-positioning.qmd)
- [Theorem-to-Experiment Alignment](theorem-to-experiment-alignment.qmd)
- [Writing Theory Sections](writing-theory-sections.qmd)
- [Writing Experiment Sections](writing-experiment-sections.qmd)
- [Reproducibility Checklist](reproducibility-checklist.qmd)
- [Review and Rebuttal](review-and-rebuttal.qmd)

## A Good First Route

If you want the shortest route through this section, use this order:

1. [Venue Map](venue-map.qmd)
2. [How Top-Venue Papers Are Shaped](how-top-venue-papers-are-shaped.qmd)
3. [Claim-Evidence Matrix](claim-evidence-matrix.qmd)
4. [Related Work and Positioning](related-work-and-positioning.qmd)
5. [Theorem-to-Experiment Alignment](theorem-to-experiment-alignment.qmd)
6. [Writing Theory Sections](writing-theory-sections.qmd)
7. [Writing Experiment Sections](writing-experiment-sections.qmd)
8. [Reproducibility Checklist](reproducibility-checklist.qmd)
9. [Review and Rebuttal](review-and-rebuttal.qmd)
